pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; keeping the property at 17 would result in incorrect compiler flags and potential runtime incompatibilities with features requiring JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the spring-context dependency to a specific Atlassian-patched version.
